parameters.query: SELECT direct_url, name->>'en' as product_name FROM products WHERE keywords @> ARRAY[{{$node["Instagram Trigger"].json["message"]}}]::text[] LIMIT 1

parameters.message: Thanks for your interest in {{$node["Supabase Fetch"].json["product_name"]}}! Here is the link: {{$node["Supabase Fetch"].json["direct_url"]}}
